name: LIDR - Kimi/DeepSeek
postCreateCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv python install 3.11 && uv venv && uv pip install openai litellm fastapi uvicorn psycopg2-binary pandas jupyter ipykernel && echo '>>> Entorno listo. uv, Python 3.11, Docker, Jupyter, SDKs instalados.'
postStartCommand: docker --version && docker compose version && echo '>>> Docker listo. Ejecuta: docker compose up -d'
